eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 7:53 PM on JUN 22, 2026 Effective until 10:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from San Antonio, Texas. Missing child is Escarleth Vasquez, 15 year old Hispanic female last seen wearing a black hoodie and white sweatpants. And Alejandro Vasquez, 1 year old Hispanic male. Call Texas D P S with information at 2 1 0 5 3 1 2 2 8 4. If seen call 9 1 1. AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from San Antonio, Texas. Missing child is Escarleth Vasquez, 15 year old Hispanic female last seen wearing a black hoodie and white sweatpants. And Alejandro Vasquez, 1 year old Hispanic male. Call Texas D P S with information at 2 1 0 5 3 1 2 2 8 4. If seen call 9 1 1.. 
To view all active alerts, click here: https://txsubscribealerts.dps.texas.gov/alerts
